description: Learn how to season food properly to enhance flavors.
steps: 1. Understand the different types of seasonings (salt, pepper, herbs, spices).
2. Start with a small amount of seasoning and taste as you go.
3. Mix seasonings to create your own blends.
4. Use fresh herbs for a vibrant flavor and dried herbs for convenience.
safety_tips: Avoid over-seasoning, which can ruin a dish.
Be cautious with salt intake for health reasons.
